assertions.assertion: Explains that by default BFF converts 401/403 to JSON-friendly responses instead of redirects
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pattern 3 states 'BFF converts 401/403 responses from local API endpoints into JSON-friendly responses (no redirect)'

assertions.assertion: Endpoint still uses .AsBffApiEndpoint() for CSRF protection
Endpoint uses .RequireAuthorization() to trigger the challenge
